title: Country Delight is Hiring: E-commerce Executive (Junior)

jsonLd.title: Country Delight is Hiring: E-commerce Executive (Junior)
jsonLd.description:
If you're a passionate E-commerce Executive with drive and ambition, Country Delight in Kochi is the place for you. We're growing fast and need talented people to grow with us.

About Country Delight:
Country Delight is a leading organization in the Hybrid sector, committed to excellence, innovation, and employee growth. We offer a dynamic work environment where talent is recognized and rewarded.

Key Responsibilities:
• Track key performance indicators including GMV, conversion rate, and ROI
• Create engaging content for product pages and social media
• Manage customer reviews, ratings, and return/refund processes
• Optimize product pages for search visibility and conversion
• Build and maintain affiliate and influencer marketing programs
• Manage email marketing campaigns and push notifications
• Collaborate with logistics partners to ensure timely delivery

Required Skills & Qualifications:
• MBA from a recognized university
• 3-6 years of relevant experience
• Proficiency in SEO/SEM
• Proficiency in Content Writing
• Proficiency in WooCommerce
• Proficiency in Shopify
• Proficiency in Supply Chain
• Proficiency in Product Management
• Proficiency in Digital Marketing
• Proficiency in CRM Software

Work Mode: Hybrid - Flexible work-from-home and office

What We Offer:
• Employee stock options (ESOPs) for eligible roles
• Modern office with recreational facilities
• Flexible working hours
• Recognition and rewards programs
• Transportation and conveyance allowance
• Annual performance appraisal
• Salary Range: 7 LPA - 15 LPA per annum

Location: Kochi, Kerala, India

If you are excited about this opportunity, apply now and take the next step in your career journey with Country Delight!
